case_title: JOHN SHEK VS. CAPITAL ONE CREDIT CARD ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. FILED BY DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-15-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE CREDIT CARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2019 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC (VIA COURTCALL), PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. NO NEW EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEK, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE CREDIT CARD

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,472.93 FILED BY SHEK, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE CREDIT CARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO INCLUDE AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT(MIDLAND FUNDING LLC) AND TO CORRECT THE AGENT OF SERVICE FOR THE ORIGINAL DEFENDANT(CAPITAL ONE BANK) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEK, JOHN
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED NOV-28-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE CREDIT CARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-02-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOHN SHEK. DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE CREDIT CARD DID NOT APPEAR. PROOF OF SERVICE DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MELIFF; JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CSC LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEK, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-15-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEK, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIDLAND FUNDING LLC $1,472.93 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,517.93, DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CO-DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE CREDIT CARD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CSC ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEK, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE CREDIT CARD
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED AS TO MIDLAND FUNDING. LLC.
